confirmAppointText2: We look forward to our meeting. If necessary, the administrator will contact you to clarify the details.

timeLeftText: Time left to complete the reservation
contactAdminText: Can't find a free time? Contact our administrator and we will help you to make an appointment for the desired time.
prepaymentInfo: Services are booked with a prepayment of 50% of the selected service cost. This ensures your preferred date and time are reserved for you. The prepayment will be deducted from the total amount due at the end of your appointment.
apiUnavailableText: Online registration is temporarily unavailable. We apologize for the inconvenience — we are already fixing everything.
apiUnavailableContact: Please write to us on WhatsApp — we will quickly process your registration, or call us
aiChatSub: Describe your service — AI will pick the time and stylist in a minute
